infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: BANCO accesses your photos and videos only when you choose them to add to a listing, a chat message, your profile picture, or your business verification documents and identity photo.

plugins.photosPermission: BANCO accesses your photos and videos only when you choose them to add to a listing, a chat message, your profile picture, or your business verification documents and identity photo.
plugins.cameraPermission: BANCO uses the camera only when you choose to take a photo for a listing, or to capture your business verification documents and identity photo during account verification.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: BANCO uses your location only when you tap “use my location” to set a listing’s place, or to find listings near you.
